final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic for a technical tutorial on deploying Hermes in a Docker container and integrating with GLMCodingPlan, labeled with clear 1-2-3-4 steps.

Style/medium: flat vector infographic, technical documentation style, clean UI illustration, minimal icons for Docker containers and deployment flow
Composition: vertical four-panel layout, numbered steps 1-2-3-4 stacked top to bottom, each panel with icon + text + code snippet placeholder
Subject: step-by-step deployment guide showing Docker container setup, Hermes installation, configuration, and GLMCodingPlan integration
Scene/backdrop: clean white or light gray background, subtle grid lines for technical documentation feel
Color palette: Docker blue (#0db7ed) as primary accent, neutral grays for code blocks, green for success states
Text (verbatim): "如何在docker容器里部署hermes，并且接入glmcodingplan"
Constraints: must display clearly at web article width (800px), text must remain legible at 50% zoom, icons must be simple line style
Avoid: 3D renders, photorealistic elements, cluttered layouts, decorative flourishes, watermark, stuffer words like 8K or masterpiece
